title_en: Pets, Cattle, and the Quiet Choice That Defines Your AI Agent's Architecture
dek_en: A developer who has shipped an AI agent to production argues that the industry's hottest abstractions — Anthropic's "session, sandbox, harness" trio, the "don't treat agents as pets, treat them as cattle" slogan — only become useful once yo
title_zh: 当“别把AI agent当宠物”这种话不再悬浮：一次踩坑后的架构反思
dek_zh: 最近 Anthropic 的 Managed Agents 让“AI agent 不应该是被精心呵护的宠物，而应该是日夜工作的牛马”这类说法再次刷屏。一位独立开发者在自己的视频里坦言：这些抽象表述听起来都对，但真要动手做时，反而无从下手。他选择从自己实际踩过的坑出发，用一段 Human-in-the-loop 的实现经历，反推这些“高大上”的概念到底在指什么。
